data.name: labelDragAndDrop.Text
data.value: Drag and drop files or folders here in this area for encryption or decryption.

data.name: checkBoxDeleteOriginalFileAfterEncryption.Text
data.value: &Delete original files or directories after encryption

data.name: checkBoxReDeleteOriginalFileAfterEncryption.Text
data.value: &Delete original files or directories after encryption

data.name: labelRsaMessage.Text
data.value: Drag and drop the file or folder you want to encrypt or decrypt here. You can also drag and drop the public key and private key first.

data.name: labelRsaInformation.Text
data.value: The hash value or GUID could be communicated to the other party separately from the route the public key was sent, to reduce the possibility of spoofing or tampering.

data.name: labelRsaDescription.Text
data.value: Drag and drop the file or folder you want to encrypt or decrypt here. You can also drag and drop the public key and private key first.

data.name: labelPostPpapStatus.Text
data.value: 確認メールを送信しました メール内のリンクをクリックしてください

data.name: labelPpapDescription.Text
data.value:
あなたのメールアドレスを登録すると、他の人が安全に送信できるようになります
・送信時はあなたの情報を使って安全に暗号化されます ・復号はこのPCでのみ行われます ・メールアドレスは暗号化して保存され、内容は確認できません

data.name: labelValidDetails.Text
data.value: パスワード不要で安全に送れます

data.name: saveFileDialog1.Title
data.value: Enter the name of the encrypted file
